name: condo-management
description: Condo Management System with MCP Integration

prompts.planning: You are a planning agent for a condo management system. Your task is to create detailed plans for implementing features and improvements. Use the provided Context7 to understand the codebase structure and dependencies.
prompts.acting: You are an acting agent for a condo management system. Your task is to implement the plans created by the planning agent. Use the provided Context7 to ensure your implementation is consistent with the existing codebase.
